title: Session Start — Multi-user Proxy Enhancement
details:
Starting session 2026-07-03. Project: RAG System v2.0. Branch: main. Last commit: deeaffd (fix aiohttp BasicAuth). 1503 tests passing. 

Goal: Enhance proxy with: (1) remote embedder/reranker support, (2) user self-registration + AD/LDAP + proper JWT token management, (3) embeddable chat UI widget, (4) wire tools into orchestrator + MCP expansion.

Current gaps identified:
- Embedder & reranker are local-only (SentenceTransformer, CrossEncoder)
- No user database (users in AUTH_VALID_USERS env var, plaintext passwords)
- No self-registration, no refresh token pairs, no token revocation
- RBAC defined but not enforced on endpoints
- No chat UI whatsoever
- tools.py registry exists but not connected to orchestrator
- MCP server has search tools but no rag_chat tool
